descriptions.text: The hard hitting fighting league led by Akira Maeda Martial Arts. You know it from the broadcast on WOWOW, and is characterized by techniques and groundwork. A Realistic fighting game which all the real name combatants have taken part and motion captured the movements for the player to control!

Fighting Network Rings, trademarked as RINGS, is a Japanese combat sport promotion that has lived three distinct periods: shoot style puroresu promotion from its inauguration to 1995, mixed martial arts (MMA) promotion from 1995 to its 2002 disestablishment, and a revived MMA promotion from 2008 onward.
